rationale: The citing paper references Tirunillai and Tellis (2014) mainly as one example of prior LDA-based, bag-of-words work in online review text analytics. It is used in grouped citations and a summary table to position the literature that the authors move beyond, rather than as a specific framework they adopt or directly evaluate. The citing paper does not rely on a distinct construct, method component, or empirical result from this cited paper in its own model development or estimation.
